## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`).
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm lint` / `pnpm format:check` / `pnpm test` / `pnpm build` pass locally.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (core-loop changes include integration / E2E).
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, or saved user content in the diff.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, architecture, or data model changed.
- [ ] No change to the PRD §12 data model without an explicit decision + migration.
